claim: For all integers n > 1, n is prime if and only if (n-1)! + 1 is divisible by n.
predicate: (not is_prime(n)) == ((math.factorial(n-1) + 1) % n != 0)

claim: If n > 1 is prime, then all its divisors are of the form k + 1, 1 ≤ k ≤ n - 1.
